title: Mkbuto Seatree Preserve
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mkbuto Seatree Preserve''' was an undersea forest on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

Located along the planet's equatorial belt, the Preserve was hundreds of kilometers in length. Declared a preserve for the high density of sea-growing tree and seaweed species, it was also home to thousands of species of sea creatures.

During the early stages of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] civilization, the Preserve was heavily populated, but the discovery of a tectonic border running through the Preserve made it an impossible location for long-term habitation. The wildlife continued to grow, eventually overtaking the ruins of the ancient Mon Calamari habitats.

[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] maintained a small home in the Preserve for meditation.
